scenario_title: Inconsistent understanding and help-avoidance in traditional lecture
minimal_context: The student is reviewing an Introductory Algebra exam during a class session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to review the Introductory Algebra exam today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks in) Sorry I am late to class. I know I missed the lesson you were doing for the day.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the first algebra problem on the exam.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I have a question about this part. I never do well on an exam. One day it seems like I get something, then the next I do not.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts the exam away) I don't know. I'm just not going to seek assistance with this right now, despite my poor performance.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to review the Introductory Algebra exam today.

STUDENT: (Walks in) Sorry I am late to class. I know I missed the lesson you were doing for the day.

TUTOR: Let's look at the first algebra problem on the exam.

STUDENT: I have a question about this part. I never do well on an exam. One day it seems like I get something, then the next I do not.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: (Puts the exam away) I don't know. I'm just not going to seek assistance with this right now, despite my poor performance.
